corpus.note: Small sealed demonstration corpus (English + Korean docs, config, Rust, Python).

D.desc: ripgrep 15.2.0 frozen invocation `rg -n --no-heading -F -e <term> .` with a line-to-span adapter

hanimo-rag.desc: requires the external hanimo-rag repository and an LLM

primary_result: structural properties (determinism, verified citation, forgery rejection)
note: Structural metrics are the headline and hold regardless of corpus size. Span metrics are illustrative on this small corpus and are NOT a superiority claim. See ../BENCHMARK.md for the preregistration a generalizable study requires.
